frontier_name: Additive combinatorics: Sidon sets and N(h,k) bounds
intended_use: Inspect findings, evidence, confidence, provenance, and links
Compare candidate tensions, gaps, and bridges
Serve reviewable context to MCP/HTTP clients
out_of_scope: Institutional cross-hub or broad exchange-network claims
caveats: Candidate contradictions, gaps, and bridges require human review.
Evidence ranking is heuristic: meta-analysis > RCT > cohort > case-control > case-report > in-vitro.
PubMed prior-art checks are rough signals, not proof of novelty.
Observer policy output is weighted reranking, not definitive disagreement.
Retraction impact is simulated over declared dependency links.
